headline: Raymond James Lures Away $2.8 Billion Commonwealth Financial Advisor Team
summary: It’s the latest team to jump from Commonwealth after the independent broker-dealer was acquired by LPL Financial.

raw.headline: Raymond James Lures Away $2.8 Billion Commonwealth Financial Advisor Team
raw.summary: It’s the latest team to jump from Commonwealth after the independent broker-dealer was acquired by LPL Financial.

headline: Okta surges after first-quarter earnings and revenue top expectations (OKTA)
summary: Shares climb as quarterly results beat forecastsOkta (NASDAQ:OKTA) moved sharply higher in pre-market trading on Friday, gaining more than 7% and building on a 4. 7% rise in after-hours dealings after the identity and access management specialist delivered stronger-than-expected fiscal first-quarter 2027 results.

headline: Wall Street divided on SentinelOne after workforce cut clouds earnings beat
summary: Investing.com -- SentinelOne drew mixed reactions from Wall Street after its fiscal first-quarter results, with Raymond James cutting the cybersecurity company to Market Perform while Bank of America upgraded it to Buy.
